videos.headline: Navy's Alex Tecza celebrates TD with a backflip in the end zone
videos.description: Navy's Alex Tecza scores an opening 46-yard touchdown run and celebrates with a backflip in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Navy's Alex Tecza celebrates TD with a backflip in the end zone) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Navy's Alex Tecza scores his third touchdown of the first quarter
videos.description: Navy's Alex Tecza scores a 2-yard rushing touchdown to grab his third touchdown of the first quarter vs. Charlotte.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Navy's Alex Tecza scores his third touchdown of the first quarter) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dashaun Peele nabs pick-six for Navy
videos.description: Dashaun Peele snags a pass and houses a pick-six to extend Navy's lead 38-0 against Charlotte.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dashaun Peele nabs pick-six for Navy) 2024/10/19 ESHEET
